zh.lifeSummary: Henry Harding於大約1675年出生在英國。他於1708年之前與Anne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1737年1月16日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Harding于大约1675年出生在英国。他于1708年之前与Anne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1737年1月16日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Harding was born about 1675, in England. He married Anne before 1708, in Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 16 January 1737, in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Hardingは約1675年にイギリスで生まれた。1708年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノースウンバーランドでAnneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1737年1月16日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スタフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Harding(은)는 대략 1675년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1708년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르스벌랜드에서 Anne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1737년 1월 16일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 스태퍼드에서 사망했다.

ru.Overwharton Parish, Stafford, Virginia,: овируартон пэриш, стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Henry Harding родился около 1675 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne перед 1708 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 16 январь 1737 г. в местности стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
